title: Research Bot (Example)
description: Research manager plans searches, fetches results, and synthesizes a written report using a multi-agent pipeline

actors.name: User
actors.description: Provides the research query via CLI; receives the final markdown report and follow-up questions

actors.name: OpenAI LLM
actors.description: GPT-5.4 (planner/search) and gpt-5-mini (writer) models invoked via Runner

actors.name: Web
actors.description: External internet content accessed through WebSearchTool (hosted OpenAI tool)

use_cases.name: Submit Research Query
use_cases.description: User enters a free-text research topic; triggers ResearchManager.run(query)

use_cases.name: Plan Web Searches
use_cases.description: PlannerAgent (gpt-5.4, reasoning=medium) generates 5–20 WebSearchItem objects (query + reason) packaged as WebSearchPlan

use_cases.name: Execute Parallel Web Searches
use_cases.description: Each WebSearchItem is run concurrently via asyncio.create_task; SearchAgent uses WebSearchTool to fetch and summarize results (2-3 paragraphs, <300 words each)
use_cases.output: list[str] — one summary per succeeded search
use_cases.notes: Failed searches return None and are counted but excluded from results

use_cases.name: Synthesize Research Report
use_cases.description: WriterAgent (gpt-5-mini, reasoning=medium) receives original query + all summaries and produces a structured ReportData via streamed output

use_cases.name: View Research Report
use_cases.description: Final markdown report and follow-up questions are printed to the console; short summary displayed in the live Printer UI

use_cases.name: Monitor Progress
use_cases.description: Printer component shows live status updates: planning → searching (X/N) → writing stages. Trace URL shown at start for OpenAI platform trace viewing.

key_components.name: ResearchManager
key_components.role: Orchestrator — coordinates the full pipeline: plan → search → write

key_components.name: PlannerAgent
key_components.role: Generates structured search plan from user query

key_components.name: SearchAgent
key_components.role: Executes individual web searches and produces concise summaries

key_components.name: WriterAgent
key_components.role: Synthesizes all search summaries into a long-form markdown report

key_components.name: Runner
key_components.role: Executes agents; Runner.run() for sync results, Runner.run_streamed() for writer streaming

key_components.name: Printer
key_components.role: Rich console live-display of progress status items

data_models: ReportData: {short_summary: str, markdown_report: str, follow_up_questions: list[str]}
important_notes: Multi-agent pipeline using OpenAI Agents SDK. Parallel search execution via asyncio.as_completed. Writer uses streaming (run_streamed) with periodic UI updates every 5s. Full tracing via gen_trace_id/trace context manager. Entry point: main.py → ResearchManager().run(query).
